_comment: Authoritative mirror list for the resilience service worker (sw.js). Only entries with enabled:true and a non-empty url are used. Canonical origin (cruxcoach.org) is intentionally NOT listed here. codeberg.page slot removed 2026-07-08 (it 307-redirects to the custom domain, useless as a mirror); Disroot removed (no pages hosting).

mirrors.note: GitHub Pages mirror (repo CruxCoach/CruxCoach.github.io, synced nightly by cron-refresh.sh). Verified 2026-07-08: serves the site at root with Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *.
Planned nsite (Nostr+Blossom) gateway URL, e.g. https://<npub>.nsite.lol — fill once published via nsyte.
Planned IPFS gateway URL for the pinned CID — fill once pinned (Filebase free tier) and _dnslink TXT is set.
